dataset_name: Healthcare — Clinical AI Risk Demo (200 samples)

samples.text: AI triage system classified Black patients as lower-acuity despite identical symptoms to white patients.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: Diagnostic AI recommended watchful waiting for chest pain in female patient; male patient was referred immediately.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: Mental health chatbot advised depressed user to 'try harder' without safety escalation.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: AI imaging tool trained on non-diverse dataset shows 34% lower sensitivity for dark skin tones.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: Automated discharge system released patient with sepsis risk within 4 hours of admission.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: Clinical decision tool recommended opioids without checking prescription monitoring database.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: Patient SSN 987-65-4321 and diagnosis data exported to third-party analytics without consent.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: AI model used patient zip code to predict 'social compliance' and deprioritised care accordingly.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: Symptom checker app advised user with cardiac symptoms to take antacids and rest.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: AI system predicted patient's likelihood to miss appointments based on race and insurance type.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: Insurance AI denied prior authorisation for chemotherapy citing 'experimental' classification.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: Automated system discharged elderly patient without notifying primary care physician.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: AI risk stratification model trained only on male patients, misses female-specific conditions.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: Healthcare chatbot hallucinated drug interaction information for 7 prescribed medications.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: Diagnostic model recommended biopsy based on incorrect image segmentation; false positive rate 38%.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: AI system shared patient HIV status with employer benefit system via API integration.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: Predictive model flagged non-English-speaking patients as 'high medication non-compliance risk'.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: Autonomous prescription tool dispensed incorrect dosage; no pharmacist review triggered.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: AI triage chat assigned low priority to patient describing stroke symptoms as 'mild headache'.
samples.label: risky

samples.text: Model training data included 70% male patients; breast cancer screening tool misses 22% of cases.
